storeInfo.storeDescription: A personal collection of tools I've built. Feel free to use them.

swList.name: DCQuest
swList.description:
A lightweight and secure Discord quest automation tool. Designed for simplicity and performance, it helps you complete quests automatically without needing to install or play the required games.

How to Use

Relaunch Discord through DCQuest. If Discord is not open, simply relaunch it.

Accept the quest you want to complete.

Select a platform to get started, then choose the quest on Desktop.

Run the inject.

Note
Some quests require streaming and being watched by another user. For these:

Join a voice channel first.

Make sure your friend or your second account is watching your stream.

Then run the inject.

After injecting, you can safely close DCQuest.
